Features.Label: Telemetry & Diagnostic Data
Features.ToolTip: Stops Windows from sending diagnostic data to Microsoft

Features.Label: Bing Search in Windows Search
Features.ToolTip: Removes Bing web results from Windows Search

Features.Label: Widgets
Features.ToolTip: Disables the Widgets panel on the taskbar

Features.Label: Suggested Notifications
Features.ToolTip: Stops Windows from showing suggested app notifications

Features.Label: Third-party Background Apps
Features.ToolTip: Prevents third-party apps from running in the background

Features.Label: Delivery Optimization (P2P)
Features.ToolTip: Stops Windows from sharing updates with other PCs

Features.Label: Fast Startup
Features.ToolTip: Disables fast startup for a full shutdown experience

Features.Label: End Task in Taskbar
Features.ToolTip: Adds 'End Task' option to taskbar right-click menu

Features.Label: System Dark Mode
Features.ToolTip: Enables dark mode for Windows and apps

Features.Label: Show File Extensions
Features.ToolTip: Shows file extensions for known file types in Explorer

Features.Label: Classic Context Menu (Win10)
Features.ToolTip: Restores the classic Windows 10 right-click menu

Features.Label: Xbox Game Bar & DVR
Features.ToolTip: Disables Xbox Game Bar and game recording features
